import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 23, 
    'description': 'v23 reactive heuristic (follow on detector>0.05|dist<3.5 at base=0.25 +0.08*err clipped[0.15,0.4], pure-rotate if |angle|>0.26, ang_k=-7.0, OA only detector<0.25+min_front<0.85 w/ robust valid>0.01 left/right/center depth, backup<0.85, seek linear clipped when far, aligned vel~0.25 for human speed match, detector-gated OA, per-step safe accum+streak using exact config success_angle+compass, fixed collision handling, one Env+resets, full JSON+diagnostics). Targets persistent following for >=500 safe steps in some episodes.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v23 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v23 tightens rotate threshold, improves depth valid masks+OA gating, better speed match for dynamic humanoid.')
